goal: Implement the mock-only auth header gate on the local HTTP mock route and keep the full review suite green.
claims: The local HTTP mock route requires X-Bluepilot-Mock-Auth: local-review for POST JSON requests.
Missing or wrong mock auth header returns HTTP 403 with mock-safe blocked body.
Valid mock auth preserves existing mock route fixture behavior.
No real auth, token, cookie, secret, persistence, or live Builder behavior is added.
assumptions: The mock header is not a real security mechanism.
Only the HTTP route layer needs this gate; CLI and endpoint fixture behavior remain unchanged.
The existing review suite should remain green through the HTTP route tests.
dod: node tools/test-builder-adapter-http-route.cjs exits 0 and covers valid, missing, and wrong mock auth header.
stop_conditions: Real auth, token, cookie, secret, persistence, or live Builder behavior becomes necessary
Package or dependency change becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-017 defines X-Bluepilot-Mock-Auth: local-review as a local review gate only, not real security.
